message:
Fix Dropbox EDEADLK crashes, adapt to Beeper API changes

Two fixes:

1. FileHandle.write() throws ObjC NSExceptions (not Swift Errors),
   which bypass do/catch entirely and crash the process. Switch to
   FileHandle.write(contentsOf:) which throws proper Swift errors.

2. Beeper API no longer returns a `network` field on chats — the
   accountID carries the same value. Make `network` a computed
   property that returns accountID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@ struct Chat: Codable {
     let id: String
     let localChatID: String?
     let accountID: String

     let participants: Participants
@@ -21,6 +20,9 @@ struct Chat: Codable {
     let isMuted: Bool?
     let isPinned: Bool?
     let preview: Message?
+
+    /// The Beeper API uses accountID as the network identifier
+    var network: String { accountID }
 }
 
 struct Participants: Codable {
